messages.content:

Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

message.content: This section consists solely of a title/header. It can answer: What is the overarching topic? (Global mobile game marketing trends). What is the reference year? (2025). It does not contain information to answer questions regarding specific entities, additional dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. No substantive data or analysis is present in this section.
